title: Displaying Monday.com dashboards throughout the office on large screens
excerpt:
If you’re looking for how to display Mango.com dashboards throughout the office, here is the solution. 
Check smartnmagic.com, they offer large digital wall displays, where you can display your dashboards from Mango.com …

posts.author: dimasua (Dmytro Skyba)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re looking for how to display Mango.com dashboards throughout the office, here is the solution.
Check smartnmagic.com, they offer large digital wall displays, where you can display your dashboards from Mango.com and hang those on walls in the office. The displays are Wi-Fi connected and are using dakboard as displays management software under the hood.
